stat_1.desc: First key metric — an actual number, e.g. "78%", "3x"

label_1.desc: short label for the first metric

stat_2.desc: Second key metric — an actual number, e.g. "78%", "3x"

label_2.desc: short label for the second metric

stat_3.desc: Third key metric — an actual number, e.g. "78%", "3x"

label_3.desc: short label for the third metric

source.desc: source, footnote, date, or small caption
